queen-cake-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Queen Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 g + frutos secos q.b.  frutos secos picados

instructions: In a bowl, mix the milk with the yeast, then add the flour, sugar, butter, eggs, brandy and lemon and tangerine to taste and knead well until the dough is homogeneous.

Mold the dough into a ball and let it leave until it gets twice the volume. After that time, knead again, gather the chopped dried fruits and knead again. Mold a ball, make a hole in the middle and cast in a circle.

Have it on a tray sprinkled with flour and let it leave till it is double the volume again. Brush the queen cake with the yolk, previously mixed with the two tablespoons of milk, and place on top more dried fruits.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for about 25 to 30 minutes. Remove from the oven and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.
